ChangeRequest.name: `Other collateral instrument received` entity type's definition seems to exclude `Deposit`(s)
ChangeRequest.comment:
<!-- See: documentation on [Issues in GitLab](https://gitlab.sofa.dev/sdd-bird-team/bird-logical-data-model/-/wikis/Issues-in-GitLab) -->
# Overview
It seems that the definition of the entity type `Other collateral received instrument` excludes `Deposit`(s). Hence `Deposit` as collateral would not be covered by the BIRD LDM.
### Contact person
dominik.lin-ully@oenb.at
### Background information
The `Other collateral received instrument` entity type's definition reads: "Other collateral received instrument is a Collateral received instrument that is not an Over the counter (OTC) Credit default swap received as collateral instrument.
Other collateral received instrument is an instrument role that is the assignment of receivables. This assignment is where the future cash flows are pledged as collateral. It is legally not a pledge but an assignment of receivables. These could be : Finance lease, Other trade receivable, Credit card debt, Other loan. It pledges future cash flow as collateral. (note: not "Factoring")"
I interpret the second part as a limitation / restriction which would not cover `Deposit`(s) because in this case the `Deposit` and not the future cash flows of the `Deposit` would act as collateral.
If this interpretation is correct `Deposit` as collateral would not be covered by the BIRD LDM.
### Points/Questions to resolve
* check if you agree with my interpretation * if you agree, adjust the model so that it covers the use case of `Deposit`(s) as collateral * if you disagree, please enhance / improve the definition
### Related issues
### Before closing checklist - [ ] Assignee for review - [ ] Assignee to close - [ ] Other actions
